summary: Display scrubber when live game stream plays
description: GIVEN a user is logged in

steps.action: WHEN a user plays a live streaming video
steps.result:
THEN the scrubber displays
AND the selected broadcaster is displayed above the game match up
AND the game match up displays left justified above the scrubber bar
AND the scrubber bar is filled in blue with the playhead appearing on the far right-hand side of the scrubber bar
AND the elapsed time is right justified below the scrubber bar
AND "Broadcast Options" displays left justified, below the scrubber bar
AND after 10 seconds of inactivity the scrubber is dismissed
AND the video continues to play

**NOTE:** Broadcast Options are only enabled for DM5/MLB Experience, in non-PROD environments
